title: lamium garganicum subsp. longiflorum
intro: Lamium garganicum subsp. longiflorum, also known as Lamium longiflorum, is a flowering plant species in the family Lamiaceae, commonly found in the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Lamium longiflorum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe respiratory problems. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, tinctures, and teas, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
